name: Travels with Agatha Christie & Sir David Suchet
original_name: Travels with Agatha Christie & Sir David Suchet
overview: In Travels with Agatha with Sir David Suchet, the actor will replicate Poirot author Christie’s journey, which spanned former British Empire territories Canada, Hawaii, South Africa, New Zealand and Australia as part of a trade mission. Each episode will feature one of the five countries.
